title: Unified Performance (Full)
description: ModPack mainly to give better Chunk times and Higher Render Distance. This uses Fabric as a base to load the Mods.
body:
ModPack mainly to achieve better Chunk times and Higher Render Distance. This uses Fabric as a base to load the Mods. This is a optimised ModPack for High Chunk count and FPS, designed around Sodium and Iris for Shader support. Most shaders should work with this ModPack.

**Note for NVIDIA users:** 

 - If you **don’t** plan to use **shaders**, check out our [Nvidium Performance ModPack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/nvidium-performance-(full)) for maximum FPS and ultra-high chunk distances, for your hardware.

**Mods Used:** 

- Bobby (Up to MC 1.21.9)

- Cloth Config

- Entity Culling

- Fabric API
  
- Ferrite Core

- Mod Menu

- Memory Leak Fix (Up to MC 1.20.4) 

- Noisium (Up to MC 1.21.6)

- Place Holder API

- Sodium

- Thread Tweak (Up to MC 1.21.5)

- Lithium

- Modern Fix (Up to MC 1.21.4)

- Immediately Fast

- Krypton (Up to MC 1.21.9)

- Iris (Shaders) 

Logo made with the help of **Canva.**

**Licensing Note:** This modpack is an independent project and is NOT officially associated with or endorsed by the original developers of Nvidium, Sodium, or any other included mod. All mods included in this ModPack are open-source and used under their respective licenses (mostly MIT or GPL).
